backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no defined methods.
feature_evidence.json: JSON report listing feature evidence, affected files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing prewritten summaries of various frontend source files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS setup defining color variables and theme styles for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML file mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app router and layout configuration using TanStack Router with global UI components.
frontend/src/components/auth/InterestsCh: Checkbox list component allowing users to select or deselect interests.
frontend/src/components/categories/Categ: Clickable chip buttons that update the global selected category filter.
frontend/src/components/feed/AudioCard.t: Audio item card with play controls, metadata, likes/dislikes, and expandable comments.
frontend/src/components/feed/CommentsPan: Scrollable comments list showing author initials, timestamp, and text.
frontend/src/components/language/Languag: Popover dropdown for selecting built‑in or custom languages with add‑language support.
frontend/src/components/layout/BrandingB: Displays the top branding banner with logo, slogan, and a dropdown menu component.
Provides a dropdown navigation menu with links to various informational pages.
frontend/src/components/layout/FloatingB: Shows a floating button that returns the user to the feed unless the mini-player is active.
frontend/src/components/layout/FloatingL: Renders a floating language filter popover allowing selection and creation of languages unless the mini-player is active.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Implements the main header with a search bar and buttons for upload and authentication.
frontend/src/components/layout/PrimaryNa: Displays primary navigation buttons and highlights the active route.
frontend/src/components/onboarding/Onboa: Presents a multi-step onboarding flow with progress tracking and navigation.
frontend/src/components/player/MiniPlaye: Shows a fixed mini audio player with playback controls, progress, volume, and close action.
frontend/src/components/search/SearchBar: Provides a search input that updates feed filters and auto-selects a default language.
frontend/src/components/upload/AudioSour: Lets users choose between uploading an audio file or a placeholder recording option.
frontend/src/components/upload/CategoryP: Offers a searchable category selector with support for creating custom categories.
frontend/src/components/upload/UploadFor: React form for uploading audio with fields, validation, and mock submission.
frontend/src/components/upload/useAudioD: Hook that checks audio metadata to ensure duration is under three hours.
frontend/src/constants/categories.ts: Defines an array of content categories and its Category type.
frontend/src/constants/interests.ts: Builds a combined interests list from categories plus additional topics.
frontend/src/constants/languages.ts: Exports a full list of supported ISO 639-1 languages plus a 'no language' option.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomLanguages.ts: Hook for managing custom user-defined languages with localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity auth state, login, and context provider logic.
frontend/src/hooks/useOnboarding.ts: Tracks onboarding completion state in localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file for future backend query hooks.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS setup with custom theme variables and light/dark mode styles.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility function for merging class names with Tailwind merge behavior.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity, and renders the app.
frontend/src/mock/mockAudio.ts: Defines mock audio and comment interfaces and exports a list of sample audio items with metadata, languages, and comments.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page showing placeholder text about SPEAKR’s mission and upcoming content.
frontend/src/pages/AuthPage.tsx: Implements login and registration UI with form state, validation, tab switching, and placeholder submit handlers.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Static Contact page with placeholder text for future contact options.
frontend/src/pages/ExplorePage.tsx: Displays category cards that update feed filters and navigate back to the feed.
frontend/src/pages/FeedPage.tsx: Renders filtered audio items based on search, category, and language selections using mock data.
frontend/src/pages/HelpPage.tsx: Static Help/FAQ page with placeholder content.
frontend/src/pages/OnboardingPage.tsx: Wraps the onboarding wizard and marks completion before navigating home.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPage.tsx: Static Privacy Policy page with placeholder text.
frontend/src/pages/TermsPage.tsx: Static Terms of Service page with placeholder text.
frontend/src/pages/UploadPage.tsx: Displays the upload form within the standard layout.
frontend/src/player/PlayerProvider.tsx: Provides audio player context with play, pause, seek, volume control, and progress tracking using an HTML audio element.
frontend/src/state/feedFilters.ts: Zustand store managing search, category, language filters, and browser-language auto-selection.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with dark mode, content paths, extended color tokens, typography, animations, and custom theme settings for containers, fonts, shadows, and keyframes.
project_state.json: Defines the project's current state, planned feature expansions, architectural notes, known issues, and existing feature metadata for the SPEAKR web app.
